title: Food Stuff Recipes
description: A datapack adding recipes for Food Stuff's foods
body:
![Kokko & SC4's Food Stuff showing off the main recipe of the datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2d5524c0626d7e2f9a3a869b1be88a211868486.png)

---

**Food Stuff Recipes** is a **DataPack** that adds recipes for new delicious food items with different saturation and nutrition levels, and they even have hidden effects for each special food type!

This datapack works well with its **[Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/food-stuff)** to show the amazing food textures and models to all your friends on any server you like (where you can get this datapack added)!
